name: Someone's Notes
description: A haphazardly stacked pile of books at Frostmoon Enclave, most of which are not carefully bound volumes but rather handwritten journals by an unknown author.\nOften, books like these contain gripping stories full of twists and turns. The messy handwriting, chaotic sentence structure, and the marks left on the pages here all seem to speak of the author's true state of mind while writing.
